description: Core `for <name> from <expr> to <expr> by <expr>` long form (spec/grammar.md:142-143): the `by` step clause parses and the loop variable `:i` reads cleanly inside the body with zero `check()` diagnostics — the `by` clause does not disturb the loop-variable binder scope. `core-language/check/undefined-var-declared-forms-clean` covers the no-`by` `for ... from ... to` form but not this `by`-step variant.
